description.value:
Requirements You're wielding a melee weapon that deals bludgeoning damage.

Sometimes the only way to take care of a haywire prototype or malfunctioning doodad is to give it a good old-fashioned wrench-thrashing. Make a Strike with the required weapon against a creature that is glitching. On a hit, instead of dealing the weapon's normal damage, you deal @Damage[1[bludgeoning]] damage and reduce the target's glitching value by 1 (or by 2 on a critical hit).
